name: Prototype
description_en: Build a throwaway prototype to flesh out a design — a runnable terminal app for state and business-logic questions, or several radically different UI variations toggleable from one route.
description_zh: 构建一个用完即弃的原型来打磨设计——针对状态与业务逻辑问题做一个可运行的终端小程序，或在同一路由下生成几种风格迥异、可切换的 UI 变体。
long_en: One skill from Matt Pocock's skills collection (this entry installs only the skills/engineering/prototype folder, not the whole repo). It picks one of two branches — a tiny interactive terminal app to stress-test a state machine or business logic, or several radically different UI variations switchable via a URL search param — building clearly-marked throwaway code with one run command, in-memory state, no polish, to be deleted or absorbed once it answers its question.
long_zh: Matt Pocock 技能合集中的一个技能（本条目只安装 skills/engineering/prototype 这一个目录，而非整仓）。它会在两个分支中择一：要么做一个小型交互式终端程序来压测状态机或业务逻辑，要么生成几种通过 URL 查询参数切换的、风格迥异的 UI 变体；产出的是明确标记为用完即弃、只需一条命令运行、内存内保存状态、不做打磨的代码，待回答完问题后即删除或吸收进正式代码。
sec_note_en: This skill scaffolds and runs throwaway code in your repo — a terminal app or extra UI routes — using your existing task runner, so it executes code locally and adds temporary files near where they're used. It avoids persistence by default; if the question involves a database it may hit a clearly-named scratch DB or local file. The prototype is meant to be deleted afterward.
sec_note_zh: 该技能会在你的仓库中搭建并运行用完即弃的代码——一个终端程序或额外的 UI 路由——使用你现有的任务运行器，因此会在本地执行代码，并在使用处附近添加临时文件。它默认不做持久化；若问题涉及数据库，可能会使用命名清晰的临时数据库或本地文件。该原型用后应被删除。
